title: Public Health Analyst
description: The Broad Institute of MIT and Harvard is seeking a Public Health Analyst to support our research initiatives in disease prevention and epidemiology. You'll work on-site in our Washington, DC office, contributing to groundbreaking research that improves public health outcomes. Join a mission-driven organization advancing scientific discovery.
responsibilities: Analyze epidemiological data and public health surveillance information
Prepare research reports and presentations on disease trends and prevention strategies
Collaborate with researchers on study design and data collection protocols
Manage databases and ensure data quality and integrity in research projects
Support grant writing and research proposal development
Communicate findings to stakeholders including public health agencies and policymakers

requirements.education: Master's degree in Public Health, Epidemiology, or related field preferred; Bachelor's required
skills: Data analysis and statistical software (R, Python, or SAS)
Epidemiological research methods and study design
Knowledge of infectious and chronic disease epidemiology
Database management and data quality assurance
Ability to work collaboratively in research environments

benefits: On-site position at prestigious research institution
